probes.name: localization-catalogue-seeded
probes.description: PlatformLanguage catalogue has at least English + one other locale seeded, each with a resolvable geography_language_id.

probes.name: localization-geography-fk-integrity
probes.description: Every PlatformLanguage.geography_language_id resolves to a live geography::Language row; every non-null geography_country_id resolves to a live geography::Country. Failure indicates orphaned rows after a vendor `world:install --force` truncation.
probes.reference: The FK constraints are onDelete=restrict so the DB should never permit orphans, but this probe catches out-of-band data manipulation.

probes.name: localization-cache-reachable
probes.description: Redis LRU cache namespace reachable. Falls back to DB on failure.

probes.name: localization-openai-reachable
probes.description: OpenAI API reachable (models endpoint). Non-critical because other drivers exist.

probes.name: localization-translation-job-stuck
probes.description: No TranslationJob in state=running for > 1 hour without progress.
